problems_encountered.description: Tool requires local filesystem access to read SSH public key file. Attempted to read from /home/nodejs/.ssh/id_rsa.pub which doesn't exist in the MCP environment. MCP servers are stateless and don't have persistent filesystem access for user-specific SSH keys.

tool_response_summary: Tool execution failed. Error: SSH public key file not found: /home/nodejs/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
execution_notes: This is a known MCP environment limitation. The tool tries to read from a default local file path that doesn't exist in the containerized MCP server. This tool would require either passing the public key content as a parameter or having persistent storage for SSH keys, neither of which is currently implemented.
